objective: Analyze the Go code in this repo for usefulness and quality, compare ao to best-in-class Go CLIs, and plan how to close the gap.

tracker_health.reason: bd probes succeeded and discovery created epic soc-n67 with six child issues.

pre_mortem_required_fix: Issue 2 must emit docs/cli-surface.json as the machine-readable command-surface sidecar; Issue 3 and Issue 4 must consume it instead of parsing docs/cli-surface.md.
done_criteria: The live gc bridge boundary no longer panics or fails the full Go suite on hosts where gc resolves to the wrong binary.
The ao command surface is classified by public/internal/stateful/deprecated/manual-only status with durable owner and reason fields.
Generated command docs remain in parity with Cobra help and include richer stable metadata.
Supported JSON output contracts fail mechanically on invalid non-empty JSON.
PowerShell completion works and selected enum-like flags have completion coverage.
A bounded two-command Options/writer pilot reduces process-global output coupling without changing user-facing behavior.
Go complexity guidance, gates, and hot-file expectations are aligned.

test_levels.rationale: The plan changes CLI contracts, generated docs, completion generation, focused command rendering, and one external binary boundary. It does not require L3 unless RPI runtime orchestration behavior changes.

fails.reason: TestGCBridgeVersion_Live panics after /usr/bin/gc version exits 0 with empty stdout and stderr text 'Can't open version'.

fails.command: cd cli && go run ./cmd/ao completion powershell
fails.reason: PowerShell is not accepted by the current completion command.
